title: MCP Tool Standard Response Envelope
description: Every tool in the AI Trust & Safety Engine MCP Server must return this envelope.

tool.description: The name of the MCP tool that produced this response.

source_file.description: The knowledge base file that was read to produce this response.

last_updated.description: The date the knowledge file was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD).

status.description: Staleness of the knowledge. 'outdated' triggers a client warning.

warning.description: Optional warning message. Set when status is 'outdated'.

data.description: The tool-specific payload. Schema varies per tool.
